news.title: 美伊战火引爆全球乱局
美潜艇击沉伊朗军舰
news.title0: US sub sinks Iranian warship in Indian Ocean, Hegseth says
news.content: 美国防长称一艘美军潜艇在印度洋用鱼雷击沉伊朗军舰，据信造成约180人伤亡。
news.content0: US Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has said an American submarine sank an Iranian warship in the Indian Ocean.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 俄天然气船在地中海沉没
news.title0: Russia blames Ukrainian naval drones as tanker sinks in Mediterranean
news.content: 一艘俄罗斯液化天然气运输船在地中海发生爆炸起火后沉没，俄方指责乌克兰使用无人艇袭击。
news.content0: A Russian liquefied natural gas (LNG) tanker has sunk in the Mediterranean between Libya and Malta after it was hit by explosions and a fire, Libyan port officials have said.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美参院将表决限制总统战争权
news.title0: US Senate to vote on Trump's war powers as Iran conflict continues
news.content: 美国参议院将就一项决议进行投票，旨在限制特朗普总统在伊朗冲突中未经国会批准进一步采取军事行动的能力。
news.content0: The US Senate is set to vote on a war power resolution aimed at limiting President Donald Trump's ability to order further military action in Iran.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美或本周实施15%全球关税
news.title0: Higher tariffs likely this week, says US Treasury
news.content: 美国财长表示，美国很可能在本周实施15%的全球关税，以取代此前被最高法院否决的关税政策。
news.content0: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US was "likely" to implement a 15% global tariff this week, following conflicting statements from President Donald Trump about the rate.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美会传唤司法部长就爱泼斯坦案作证
news.title0: Congress votes to summon Attorney General Bondi in Epstein case
news.content: 美国国会委员会投票决定传唤司法部长邦迪，就爱泼斯坦案调查作证，指控司法部存在“掩盖”行为。
news.content0: A congressional committee has voted to summon US Attorney General Pam Bondi to testify about the investigation into convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 苹果发布史上最便宜新款MacBook
news.title0: Apple announces its cheapest-ever new MacBook
news.content: 苹果发布起售价599美元的MacBook Neo，首次在笔记本中使用iPhone芯片，旨在吸引Windows和Chromebook用户。
news.content0: Apple on Wednesday launched the MacBook Neo, the company’s cheapest-ever new model.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 塔利班新法令允许丈夫殴打妻子
news.title0: Taliban allows men to beat their wives as long as they don’t break bones or leave open wounds
news.content: 阿富汗塔利班当局颁布法令，允许丈夫殴打妻子，只要不造成骨折或开放性伤口，人权活动人士谴责此举。
news.content0: Taliban authorities in Afghanistan have issued a draconian decree that makes sodomy punishable by death and allows men to beat their wives so long as they don’t break bones or leave visible, lasting wounds.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 美半马锦标赛因引导车失误引争议
news.title0: What went wrong in the women’s competition at the chaotic USATF half marathon championship?
news.content: 美国田径半马锦标赛女子组比赛出现混乱，领先的四名选手被引导车带错路，多跑了约1公里，导致结果争议。
news.content0: North Carolina runner Molly Born won the USA Track & Field (USATF)women’s half marathon championshipby a slim margin of just over four seconds on Sunday in Atlanta – but the result is only half the story.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 尼泊尔Z世代选民寄望说唱歌手
news.title0: Gen Z Voters in Nepal Pin Their Hopes on a Millennial Rapper
news.content: 尼泊尔即将举行大选，Z世代选民将希望寄托于一位千禧年出生的说唱歌手，期待其能带来变革。
news.content0: Nepalis will vote for a new government on Thursday, the first election since a Gen Z revolution in September turned the Himalayan nation into a surprise symbol of youthful power.
news.author: NYTimes
